visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A person is seen holding multiple red and white Costco membership cards in their hands, partially obscuring the background store sign. Large, vibrant text overlays appear in the center of the frame, accompanied by a cartoon character graphic on the left. (2) The camera begins a rapid sequence of cuts, showing various product displays within a brightly lit warehouse supermarket. Pallets of milk powder cans, boxes of coconut water, and containers of laundry detergent are shown in quick succession with text overlays. (3) The sequence continues with high-speed transitions across different aisles, showcasing snacks like shrimp crackers and beef jerky, followed by personal care items and beverages. Each frame features the product in its retail packaging on the shelves. (4) The final phases show refrigerated and frozen sections, featuring meat products, cheeses, and ice cream tubs, ending with household items like shampoo and vitamins, all presented with consistent text formatting and rapid-fire visual pacing.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 好市多每週特價速報. [Logo]: 比爾特派員. [Slogan]: 06/09~06/15 記得追蹤我們 免費會員卡磁鐵. (2) [Slogan]: 克寧紐西蘭全脂奶粉. [Variety]: 原價659 -134 特價525. (3) [Slogan]: KOH純椰子汁. [Variety]: 原價399 -80 特價319. (4) [Slogan]: 橘子工坊天然制菌除臭酵素洗衣膠囊. [Variety]: 原價589 -130 特價459. (5) [Slogan]: 歐樂B舒適深潔牙線. [Variety]: 原價489 -110 特價379. (6) [Slogan]: 北海鱈魚香絲. [Variety]: 原價299 -50 特價249.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (hands visible), 1 possible passerby in background reflections
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Only the hands of the main character are visible, holding products and membership cards.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of various aisles, shelving units, and product pallets within a large Costco warehouse, including dry goods, snacks, and refrigerated sections.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat synthesized pop music begins instantly. A male voice speaks at a rapid, enthusiastic pace, introducing the weekly sale. Brief 'whoosh' sounds accompany transition points. (2) The narration shifts into a rhythmic cadence, listing product names and price deductions. Every few seconds, a light percussive hit or 'ding' sound punctuates the transition to a new item. (3) The background music maintains a consistent, high-arousal loop with a strong 4/4 beat. The speaker's voice remains energetic and clear, with minimal background ambient noise interference. (4) As the listing continues, the vocal intensity stays high to match the rapid visual cuts. The audio is characterized by a dense layering of speech, music, and minor transitional SFX without any significant pauses until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Informational List -> Closing CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick and energetic weekly update on discounted items at Costco, intended to inform budget-conscious shoppers and drive engagement for the creator's channel.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is a compilation of various brand discounts within a retail store, likely produced as a consumer guide rather than a paid endorsement for a single product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a 'TikTok-style' hyper-fast editing rhythm to pack a large amount of product information into a short duration.
